story.prologue_000.0: The rain shows no sign of stopping.
story.prologue_000.1: You step down from the worn carriage and gaze at the muddy road.
story.prologue_000.2: This is the entrance to the Grey Forest.
story.prologue_000.4: Find the missing scout — and bring them back alive, if possible.
story.prologue_000.5: Yet the forest already seems to be watching you.
story.forest_001.0: Wet leaves tear quietly beneath your feet.
story.forest_001.2: In the distance, you hear the clash of metal.
story.ruins_001.0: The ruins are enclosed by half-collapsed stone walls.
story.ruins_001.1: Scraps of military uniform lie scattered on the waterlogged ground.
story.ruins_001.2: Footprints lead further inside. Recent ones.
story.ruins_001.3: There's no doubt — the scout passed through here.
story.forest_002.0: You push through the underbrush and find someone on the ground.
story.forest_002.1: A man in armor — the scout.
story.forest_002.2: An arrow is lodged in his leg. He's conscious but can't move.
story.forest_002.choice.0: Carry the scout out of the forest
story.forest_002.choice.1: Check the surroundings for enemies first
story.forest_003.1: Footprints are visible between the trees, but there's no movement now.
story.forest_003.2: The sound came from the north.
story.ruins_002.0: The stairs leading underground are slick and dark.
story.ruins_002.1: In the corner sits a worn backpack — likely the scout's.
story.ruins_002.2: Inside the backpack you find a small note.
story.ruins_002.3: "West tower — beware of traps. They're waiting."
story.ruins_002.choice.0: Pocket the note and head back up
ui.load_slot_hint: Select a save file to load.
ui.sleep_desc: You will sleep until the next day. Vitality restored by up to 50.
ui.journal_select_hint: Select an entry on the left.
